originalTitle: Oil posts largest quarterly price drop in 6 years as historic supply crunch eases
summary: Workarounds to the Strait of Hormuz chokepoint and a drop in crude imports to China helped ease the impact of lost Persian Gulf oil supplies.
content: Workarounds to the Strait of Hormuz chokepoint and a drop in crude imports to China helped ease the impact of lost Persian Gulf oil supplies.
chineseTitle: 随着历史性供应紧缩的缓解，石油价格录得六年来最大季度跌幅
chineseSummary: 霍尔木兹海峡咽喉要道的解决办法和中国原油进口的减少有助于缓解波斯湾石油供应损失的影响。
chineseContent: 霍尔木兹海峡咽喉要道的解决办法和中国原油进口的减少有助于缓解波斯湾石油供应损失的影响。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
